ogTitle: Boole Poole vs Boolite: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boole Poole and Boolite.
heading: Boole Poole vs Boolite — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boole Poole, Victoria and Boolite, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boolite has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Boole Poole (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boole Poole or Boolite safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boole Poole has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Boolite scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boole Poole scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Boolite scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boole Poole or Boolite?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boolite has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
